name: agentwatch
description: AgentWatch watches your AI agent sessions and alerts you when they need attention.

scripts.build: npm run generate-tray-icons && node --max-old-space-size=256 ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc && npm run copy-renderer
scripts.copy-renderer: mkdir -p dist/renderer && cp src/renderer/index.html src/renderer/styles.css dist/renderer/
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run prepare-electron && /private/tmp/AgentWatch-electron/Electron.app/Contents/MacOS/Electron .
scripts.status:approval: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8787/status -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"agent":"codex","state":"waiting_approval","message":"Codex needs approval"}'
scripts.status:running: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8787/status -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"agent":"codex","state":"running","message":"Codex is running"}'
scripts.status:idle: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8787/status -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"agent":"codex","state":"idle","message":"Codex is idle"}'
